content: Phase 1a: Sidebar.jsx — double-active fix, flatten single-item, compaction (w-248)
Phase 1b: IA dedup — Finance Reports 8→1, Procurement 15→11
Verify: esbuild compile + audit_ui_ia.py + screenshots @1280x800 light+dark
Frontend testing agent: navigation/IA regression — DONE (9 'blank' flags = false-positives, verified all render; no regression)
Phase 1c: Hub consolidation (Finance Payments/Tax → hub, Admin Operations/Loyalty → hub) to reach finance/admin ≤12 — awaiting user go-ahead (bigger IA change)
Phase 2: Per-page density (CompactStatCard migration, Akses Cepat affordance, Inventory UUID→name, StatusPill, AI collapsible)
